---
title: "Zoe Stopfer"
image: media/headshot.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/zoe-stopfer-992664342
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ZS-25-bit
    - text: Email
      href: zmstopfer@ucsb.edu

---
Hello and welcome to my website! My name is Zoe and I am currently getting a B.S in Environmental Studies at UCSB.I am interested in a future career that involves research in conservation or dealing with invasive species.  Outside of school, my simple pleasures are baking, participating in Jiu Jitsu, a raspberry lemonade!
